title: Parish may assume all indebtedness of districts
doc_html:
§586.  Parish may assume all indebtedness of districts

Subject to the provisions of Title 33, any parish may assume all the indebtedness, both bonded and floating, of any or all of the districts wholly within its territorial limits.

§586.  Parish may assume all indebtedness of districts
Subject to the provisions of Title 33, any parish may assume all the indebtedness, both bonded and floating, of any or all of the districts wholly within its territorial limits.
